meta.name: rust
meta.title: Rust Skill
meta.description: Rust programming language coding conventions and best practices Triggers on: **/*.rs

original_definition.skill_description: Rust programming language coding conventions and best practices Triggers on: **/*.rs

actions.name: Write code with good maintainability practices, including co
actions.description: Write code with good maintainability practices, including comments on why certain design decisions were made.

actions.name: Explicitly annotate lifetimes when the compiler cannot infer
actions.description: Explicitly annotate lifetimes when the compiler cannot infer them.

actions.name: Use `Rc<T>` for single-threaded reference counting and `Arc<
actions.description: Use `Rc<T>` for single-threaded reference counting and `Arc<T>` for thread-safe reference counting.

actions.name: Use `RefCell<T>` for interior mutability in single-threaded
actions.description: Use `RefCell<T>` for interior mutability in single-threaded contexts and `Mutex<T>` or `RwLock<T>` for multi-threaded contexts.

actions.name: Follow the Rust Style Guide and use `rustfmt` for automatic
actions.description: Follow the Rust Style Guide and use `rustfmt` for automatic formatting.

actions.name: Create custom error types using `thiserror` or implement `st
actions.description: Create custom error types using `thiserror` or implement `std::error::Error`.

actions.name: Eagerly implement common traits where appropriate:
actions.description: Eagerly implement common traits where appropriate:

actions.name: Use sealed traits to protect against downstream implementati
actions.description: Use sealed traits to protect against downstream implementations

actions.name: Write comprehensive unit tests using `#[cfg(test)]` modules
actions.description: Write comprehensive unit tests using `#[cfg(test)]` modules and `#[test]` annotations.

actions.name: Use test modules alongside the code they test (`mod tests {
actions.description: Use test modules alongside the code they test (`mod tests { ... }`).

actions.name: Write integration tests in `tests/` directory with descripti
actions.description: Write integration tests in `tests/` directory with descriptive filenames.

actions.name: Write clear and concise comments for each function, struct,
actions.description: Write clear and concise comments for each function, struct, enum, and complex logic.

actions.name: Use `#[doc(hidden)]` to hide implementation details from pub
actions.description: Use `#[doc(hidden)]` to hide implementation details from public documentation.
